case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS ROLLINS, FURUK D.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D. $478.78 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $546.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $586.80 AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D.
COURT DENIED AS TO PLTF'S $97.50 CLAIMED COST.IT WAS AN INVESTIGATIVE COST, WHICH IS NOT ALLOWED BY LAW, NOT A PROCESS SERVICE COST AS CLAIMED IN THE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D.
MEMO OF COSTS FILED AND SENT TO SUE FOR APPROVAL.
MOTION COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D. HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $478.78 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
HEARING ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS SET FOR 2-6-97 @ 11:00 AM; NOT 8:30 ******SEE FILE******.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS OF FEB-06-1997, GRANTED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, FURUK D.
